title: AIO_TrackingOn Function
parameters: robotNumber	An integer expression representing a robot number which you want to acquire.
description:
AIO_TrackingOn Function

AIO_TrackingOn Function

See_Also     Example

Returns whether the specified robot is executing the distance tracking function or not.
see_also:
AIO_TrackingSet, AIO_TrackingStart, AIO_TrackingEnd

AIO_TrackingOn  Functiont Example

Function Main

  Integer i

  i = AIO_TrackingOn(1)

  print i

Fend
examples:
Function Main Integer i i = AIO_TrackingOn(1) print i
Fend

Example on command window
